items.title: What if your health had a CIBIL-like score? A Hyderabad startup is building it for a decade
items.summary: ekincare's decade-long bet on structured health data is becoming the backbone of corporate healthcare in India, and the implications go far beyond employee wellness.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
